name: Spicy Black Bean Burgers
recipeIngredient: 2 cans black beans (15 oz), rinsed and drained
1 jalapeno pepper, seeded and minced (1 to 2)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the black beans, onion, parsley, garlic, jalapeno peppers, 1/3 cup flour, coriander, cumin, and cayenne in a bowl. Mix well with the beaten egg white.
2. Coarsely mash or process the mixture in a food processor using pulses until it is a thick chunky paste.
3. Add bread crumbs if needed to make the mixture firm.
4. Refrigerate for 1 to 2 hours for the flavors to blend.
5. Form into 6 patties and lightly coat with flour.
6. Cook in a sprayed skillet over medium heat for 5 to 7 minutes on each side.
